response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A. 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription utilized as the Reference JSON confirmed no vocal music is present. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to the VTuber's vocal delivery, including aggressive truncation for rapid speech and adjustments for pauses. Included translation for prominent on-screen text.

subtitles.original: 初めて本格スパイスカレー作る～オリチャー有・クロワッサン有～
subtitles.english: [Title: Making authentic spice curry for the first time ~With my original recipe and croissants~]

subtitles.original: こよりちゃん辛いの苦手だけど ちょうどいいかなと思って
subtitles.english: Koyori is bad with spicy food, but I thought this might be just right.

subtitles.original: こよりちゃん辛いの苦手だけど ちょうどいいかなという所存
subtitles.english: I feel like it'll be just right despite being bad with spicy food.

subtitles.original: はい 水に浸けといて... こういうところ A型ね
subtitles.english: Okay, soaking it in water... That's a "Type A" trait.

subtitles.original: A型出ちゃった
subtitles.english: The Type A in me is showing.

subtitles.original: しっかりね あの... 器に水をすぐ張るやつね
subtitles.english: Gotta make sure... to fill the bowl with water right away.

subtitles.original: おお! 何かうまそうな気がする
subtitles.english: Ooh! I have a feeling this is gonna be delicious.

subtitles.original: 作ってるのナポリタンやったかな?
subtitles.english: Wait, was I making Napolitan?

subtitles.original: でもナポリタンはケチャップもんね
subtitles.english: But Napolitan uses ketchup, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: これトマト... あ!
subtitles.english: This is tomato... Oh!

subtitles.original: あ すごい 完熟トマトの香りする
subtitles.english: Wow, it smells like ripe tomatoes.

subtitles.original: めっちゃ香りするなあ
subtitles.english: It really has a strong aroma.

subtitles.original: これ白い服に飛びそうだな
subtitles.english: This looks like it'll splatter on my white clothes.

subtitles.original: 気をつけよう
subtitles.english: Better be careful.

subtitles.original: で これを混ぜつつ全体に
subtitles.english: And now, mixing this in...

subtitles.original: 行ったんだろうか あの生姜とニンニクの塊は
subtitles.english: ...did those chunks of ginger and garlic blend in?

subtitles.original: エプロンつけてへんの? ほら エプロンも白やからさ
subtitles.english: Not wearing an apron? See, my apron is white too.

subtitles.original: エプロンが赤く染まっちゃいそうじゃない これ メイド服なのに
subtitles.english: My apron might get stained red, even though it's a maid outfit.

subtitles.original: メイド服汚れちゃうとさ 寂しいじゃん
subtitles.english: It'd be sad if my maid outfit got dirty.

subtitles.original: さて 炒めてます
subtitles.english: Well, I'm sautéing it.

subtitles.original: お! ここでスパイスが出てきますよ もう
subtitles.english: Oh! The spices are coming out now!

subtitles.original: ドキドキ... あくかな?
subtitles.english: How exciting... I wonder if it'll open?

subtitles.original: えー まず これ炒めてられてるのかな?
subtitles.english: Uh, first... is this being sautéed properly?

subtitles.original: ここでいいのかちょっと分かんないけど
subtitles.english: I'm not sure if this is the right timing, but...

subtitles.original: ちょっと上げて...
subtitles.english: Turning up the heat a bit...

subtitles.original: まず まあこれは入るよねという
subtitles.english: First, well, this has to go in...

subtitles.original: クミン
subtitles.english: Cumin

subtitles.original: あ 大丈夫そう 大丈夫そう
subtitles.english: Ah, it seems okay, seems okay.

subtitles.original: え 小さじ1ですね
subtitles.english: Uh, one teaspoon.

subtitles.original: おお 結構入る
subtitles.english: Ooh, quite a lot.

subtitles.original: 全然出てこない
subtitles.english: It's not coming out at all.

subtitles.original: あ やばい ここでやると水蒸気で固まりそうだから
subtitles.english: Oh no, if I do it here, the steam might make it clump up.

subtitles.original: やばい 出てこねえ
subtitles.english: Oh shoot, it's not coming out.

subtitles.original: トントン... あ! クミンが舞ってる
subtitles.english: Tap, tap... Oh! The cumin is flying everywhere.

subtitles.original: やばい 小さじ出すのも大変なんだけど
subtitles.english: Geez, even getting a teaspoon out is a struggle.

subtitles.original: あ すごい香り!
subtitles.english: Ah, what a great smell!

subtitles.original: 手袋がクミンの香りでいっぱいになりそうです
subtitles.english: My gloves are gonna reek of cumin.

subtitles.original: これ カード開封の時とか...
subtitles.english: This is like when I'm opening cards...

subtitles.original: あーー!!
subtitles.english: AAUGH!!

subtitles.original: 振ったら... あの ちゃんと小さじかなと思って振ったら...
subtitles.english: I was shaking it to see if it was a full teaspoon, and...

subtitles.original: めっちゃこぼしちゃった
subtitles.english: I spilled so much.

subtitles.original: これぐらいかな?
subtitles.english: Is this about right?

subtitles.original: うん まあこんなもんでしょう
subtitles.english: Yeah, I guess this will do.

subtitles.original: ぽい!
subtitles.english: Plop!

subtitles.original: はーい クミン!
subtitles.english: Okay, cumin!

subtitles.original: はい クミン入りましーた
subtitles.english: Okay, the cumin has been added.

subtitles.original: やばい 焦げる 焦げる やばい
subtitles.english: Oh no, it's burning! It's burning! This is bad!

subtitles.original: あ あ やばい やばいかも
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, this might be bad!

subtitles.original: 待って これ火止めたほうがいい?
subtitles.english: Wait, should I turn off the heat?

subtitles.original: いや まだ焦げてない
subtitles.english: No, it's not burnt yet.

subtitles.original: まだ大丈夫そう ちょっと待って
subtitles.english: It seems okay still. Wait a sec.

subtitles.original: 一回保温... 保温機能とかないわ あるわ
subtitles.english: Let me "keep warm"... I don't have that... oh, wait, I do.

subtitles.original: 一回切って...
subtitles.english: Let me turn it off for a bit...

subtitles.original: え 次コリアンダー
subtitles.english: Uh, next is coriander.

subtitles.original: お前ら コリアンダーって何だか知ってます?
subtitles.english: Do you guys know what coriander is?

subtitles.original: そうなの コリアンダーってパクチーのことなんだよ
subtitles.english: That's right, coriander is actually cilantro.

subtitles.original: でもさ このスパイスの形状になってると あんまりパクチーパクチーした香りがしなくて
subtitles.english: But you know, in this spice form, it doesn't really smell like cilantro.

subtitles.original: こより パクチー大好き女なんで
subtitles.english: I'm a girl who loves cilantro, so...

subtitles.original: コリアンダーも好きなんだけど...
subtitles.english: I like coriander too, but...

subtitles.original: 茶色いんだね
subtitles.english: It's brown, huh?

subtitles.original: コリアンダーって緑色だと思ってた パクチーだから
subtitles.english: I thought coriander would be green since it's cilantro.

subtitles.original: あと最後にパセリをかけるんだけど パセリあったかな? 色味のために
subtitles.english: Also, I'll add parsley at the end. Did I have any? For the color.

subtitles.original: よし こんなもんか
subtitles.english: Okay, is this enough?

subtitles.original: ちょっと少ないか こんなもんか
subtitles.english: Maybe a bit more. I guess this will do.

subtitles.original: はい ということで こちらコリアンダーです
subtitles.english: Okay, so this is the coriander.

subtitles.original: ポン!
subtitles.english: Plop!

subtitles.original: かけまして...
subtitles.english: Sprinkled it in...

subtitles.original: よし
subtitles.english: Good.

subtitles.original: まあでもそんなね パクチー苦手な人がパクチー! ってなるほどのパクチー臭は やっぱコリアンダーになっちゃうとしないね
subtitles.english: But you know, once it becomes coriander spice, it doesn't have that strong cilantro smell that makes people who hate it go "Cilantro!"

subtitles.original: 次は ターメリック
subtitles.english: Next is turmeric.

subtitles.original: ターメリック
subtitles.english: Turmeric
